summary: Completed backend testing of Blendlink Auction System. Fixed 2 bugs in auction_system.py (NoneType comparison errors). All 18 tests pass.

fixed.issue: TypeError when current_bid or reserve_price is None
fixed.fix: Added null-safe comparison: current_bid = auction.get('current_bid') or 0

fixed.issue: TypeError when current_bid or reserve_price is None
fixed.fix: Added null-safe comparison for reserve_met calculation

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed auction listings for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auction system backend fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/auctions/listing/{id}/bid, GET /api/auctions/listing/{id}/bids, GET /api/auctions/listing/{id}/status, GET /api/auctions/active, GET /api/auctions/my-bids. WebSocket at /api/auctions/ws/{listing_id}. Duration options: 1h, 3h, 6h, 12h, 1d, 2d, 3d, 5d, 7d.

feature_2_get_bid_history.details: GET /api/auctions/listing/{id}/bids returns bid history with current_bid, bid_count, time_remaining, reserve_met

feature_3_get_auction_status.details: GET /api/auctions/listing/{id}/status returns full auction status including time_remaining, auto_extend, extension_count

feature_4_get_active_auctions.details: GET /api/auctions/active returns active auction listings with time_remaining. Supports ending_soon filter.

feature_5_get_my_bids.details: GET /api/auctions/my-bids returns user's bid history. Requires authentication. Supports status filter (all, active, won, lost, outbid).

feature_6_listing_with_auction_settings.details: POST /api/marketplace/listings accepts auction field with is_auction, duration, starting_bid, reserve_price, buy_it_now_price, auto_relist, auto_extend

feature_7_duration_options.details: All duration options work: 1h, 3h, 6h, 12h, 1d, 2d, 3d, 5d, 7d. Invalid durations are rejected with 400.
